data.description:
Apply the rising floor ONLY in remediation mode and wire it parallel to `drift_refresh`
in `_run_plan_review`. Preconditions (all required, else full review): config enabled
(default true), plan changed, code UNCHANGED since baseline, registry unchanged, prior
sidecar (with text) available, last review of ANY kind within the window (default 60 min,
reset each review). Code-changed / both-drifted -> full review (drift_refresh untouched).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Config keys (enable default-true + window minutes default 60) in `src/rebar/config.py`
- [ ] Candidate check enforces all preconditions; any failure -> full review (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py`, `attest.py`)
- [ ] Window measured from the last review of any kind, reset on each review
- [ ] both-drifted -> full review; `drift_refresh` path byte-unchanged
- [ ] Coverage records narrowed=true + the floored criteria/findings
data.title: Pass-3: deterministic novelty score + rising-floor drop rule
